tools.name: -health-check
tools.description: Internal health check tool. Verifies OAuth credentials and connectivity.

tools.name: list-messages
tools.description: List email messages from inbox or a specific folder. Supports filtering by unread, importance, etc.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of messages to return (default: 10, max: 100)

folderId.description: Mail folder ID or well-known name (e.g., "Inbox", "SentItems", "Drafts", "DeletedItems", "Archive"). Defaults to Inbox.

tools.name: get-message
tools.description: Get full details of a specific email message by ID, including body and attachments.

messageId.description: The ID of the message to retrieve

tools.name: send-message
tools.description: Send an email message from the connected Outlook account.

body.description: Email body (plain text, Markdown, or HTML)

isHtml.description: Whether body is HTML (default: false, auto-detects Markdown)

importance.description: Message importance: low, normal, high (default: normal)

attachments.description: Array of file attachments to include

tools.name: reply-message
tools.description: Reply to an existing email message.

messageId.description: The ID of the message to reply to

replyAll.description: Whether to reply to all recipients (default: false)

tools.name: forward-message
tools.description: Forward an email message to other recipients.

messageId.description: The ID of the message to forward

comment.description: Optional comment to include with the forwarded message

tools.name: search-messages
tools.description: Search for email messages. Supports searching by subject, body, sender, etc.

query.description: Search query text (searches subject, body, sender, etc.)

tools.name: modify-message
tools.description: Modify a message: mark as read/unread, set importance, add categories, or flag it.

messageId.description: The ID of the message to modify

flag.description: Set flag status: notFlagged, flagged, complete

tools.name: move-message
tools.description: Move a message to a different mail folder.

messageId.description: The ID of the message to move

destinationFolderId.description: Destination folder ID or well-known name (e.g., "Inbox", "Archive", "DeletedItems", "JunkEmail")

tools.name: delete-message
tools.description: Delete a message (moves to Deleted Items) or permanently delete it.

messageId.description: The ID of the message to delete

permanent.description: If true, permanently deletes the message. Otherwise moves to Deleted Items (default: false)

tools.name: list-drafts
tools.description: List all draft emails in the account.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of drafts to return (default: 10, max: 100)

tools.name: create-draft
tools.description: Create a draft email message.

tools.name: update-draft
tools.description: Update an existing draft email by replacing its content.

draftId.description: The ID of the draft to update

tools.name: send-draft
tools.description: Send an existing draft email.

draftId.description: The ID of the draft to send

tools.name: delete-draft
tools.description: Delete a draft email.

draftId.description: The ID of the draft to delete

tools.name: list-folders
tools.description: List all mail folders in the account.

includeChildFolders.description: Whether to include child folders (default: false)

tools.name: create-folder
tools.description: Create a new mail folder.

parentFolderId.description: Parent folder ID (optional, creates at top level if omitted)

tools.name: delete-folder
tools.description: Delete a mail folder and all its contents.

folderId.description: The ID of the folder to delete

tools.name: get-attachment
tools.description: Get the content of an email attachment by its attachment ID.

messageId.description: The ID of the message containing the attachment

attachmentId.description: The ID of the attachment to retrieve

saveToFile.description: If true, saves the attachment to /workspace/email-attachments/

tools.name: store-attachment
tools.description: Download and store an email attachment to the local filesystem.

messageId.description: The ID of the message containing the attachment

attachmentId.description: The ID of the attachment to store

tools.name: list-rules
tools.description: List all inbox rules (mail filters) for the account.
